channel.title: Dhiraj Brahman on LMI
channel.description: Recent content in Dhiraj Brahman on LMI

item.title: [Bis(picolinate-kappa N-2:O)Copper(II)] di(benzene1,3,5-tricarboxylicacid): Hydrothermal synthesis, structural characterization, magneticproperties and DFT study
Poly[diaquo(1,10-phenanthroline-kappaN-2(1):N-10)(mu(2)-sulphato-kappa O-2:O `) copper(II)]: hydrothermalsynthesis, crystal structure and magnetic properties
